name: Content Reader
description: Article reading experience with browsable article listings, full article detail view, and category navigation. Optimized for long-form consumption with generous typography and effortless scanning.

page_briefs.articles: Search-filter bar at top with category chips and keyword input. Below, a card grid of article cards featuring bold headlines, subtle metadata (date, read time, author), and short excerpts. Cards emphasize text over imagery. Pagination or infinite scroll at bottom.
page_briefs.article-detail: Breadcrumb navigation at top linking back to articles and category. Clean long-form reading view with generous line-height (1.7+), comfortable measure (65-75 characters), and clear typographic hierarchy. Article title, author, date, and reading time above the body. Distraction-free — just well-set text.
page_briefs.categories: Grid of category cards showing category name, article count, and brief description. Each card links to filtered article listing. Clean layout with consistent spacing.

shells.top-nav-main: Top navigation bar with main content area for reading
